title: Mediterranean Braised Leek Dish
description: A hearty, flavorful dish featuring leeks in a rich braising liquid with a hint of Mediterranean spices.
instructions: Heat the garlicky olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the halved leeks and cook for 10-12 minutes on each side, until tender and golden.
In a separate pot, combine the Mediterranean spice blend, light chicken broth, and braised wine.
Bring the pot to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the cooked leeks to the pot and simmer for an additional 5-7 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Optional: serve over crusty bread or with a side of roasted vegetables.
